1.title: Toolchain + config plumbing
1.evidence: First step; only confirms baseline build and implements config.rs + .env.example with no consumed upstream symbols.

2.title: Service health probes
2.evidence: ApiClient::health() and db::health::probe() are standalone probes; they do not consume config types (probe takes a &str db_url, health takes base_url at construction). Independent of Task 1's config struct.

3.title: bastion status command + output
3.evidence: run::status() body: 'let config = Config::load()?;' (Task 1), 'let db = health::probe(&config.database_url).await;' and 'ApiClient::new(...).health().await;' plus 'use crate::api::client::{ApiClient, ApiStatus};' and 'use crate::db::health::{self, DbStatus};' (Task 2).

4.title: Unit tests (offline-passing)
4.evidence: Config tests call 'Config::from_vars(...)' and assert 'ConfigError::MissingVar' (Task 1). Render tests call 'render_status(&DbStatus::..., &ApiStatus::...)' referencing render_status (Task 3) and the DbStatus/ApiStatus enums (Task 2).

5.title: Validate
5.evidence: Step 5 runs the full gated suite (fmt/clippy/test/build) over all prior steps and records baseline + deviations in tasks.md Notes; it can only pass once steps 1-4 are in place.
